chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 989 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 4630/2020 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel for the respondent states that the impugned notice has been withdrawn, therefore, no cause of action remains in this petition. In view of the foregoing learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
